mapper.sql: review_id, order_id, user_id, food_id, rating, content, images, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET order_id = #{orderId}, user_id = #{userId}, food_id = #{foodId}, rating = #{rating}, content = #{content}, images = #{images}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.username, u.avatar FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.food_id = #{foodId} AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT r.*, u.username, u.avatar FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT r.*, u.username, u.avatar FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.order_id = #{orderId} AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT r.*, u.username, u.avatar FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.rating >= #{minRating} AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
